ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school belongs to */,
  "charter_authorizer" TEXT /* Authorizer of the charter school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "school_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "school_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "principal_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "enrollment_year" TEXT /* Year the enrollment data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source for the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score for the school */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score for the school */,
  "percent_passing_math" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "percent_passing_reading" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "percent_overall_passing" REAL /* Overall percentage of students passing both math and reading */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year for the performance metrics */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students included in the performance metrics */,
  "percent_student_growth_math" REAL /* Percentage of student growth in math */,
  "percent_student_growth_reading" REAL /* Percentage of student growth in reading */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of the students */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "budget_year" TEXT /* Year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the budget */,
  "budget_source" TEXT /* Source of the budget */,
  "budget_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the budget allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "math_score" REAL /* Math score of the student */,
  "reading_score" REAL /* Reading score of the student */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary guardian or parent */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the primary guardian or parent */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the user is associated with */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the user is associated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program or activity */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated to the program or activity */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the allocation is made */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program or activity */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* Name or entity that allocated the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district office */,
  "district_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the district office */,
  "district_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the district office */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_email" TEXT /* Email of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the superintendent */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the district */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)
